docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,194.79 FILED BY BARNES,CARSON AS TO DEFENDANT CRANE,ANTONIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CRANE,ANTONIA

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARNES,CARSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRANE,ANTONIA $1,194.79 PRINCIPAL, $19.74 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,214.53 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
